comments.comment: Plan proposes adding maxCrystalPoints to QualityProfile, but the actual implementation uses Math.round(quality.maxPoints * 0.8) inline in main.ts. This is simpler and avoids an interface change. The step can be dropped — no quality.ts modification is needed.
volumetricPoints.ts already contains crystalCluster and geode shapes in the VOLUMETRIC_SHAPES array. The modification is in progress (file shows as modified in git status).
Crystal mode is already registered in main.ts at line 113-125 with factory, debug entry, and quality config wiring. No further main.ts changes required.
No WaveField.ts exists in the codebase. The verification step is still valuable as a gate but will pass immediately.

risks_assessment: Risks are well-identified. Shader compile errors are the primary concern; the existing US-048 validation gate and incremental development approach mitigate this. The 0.8x point count scaling for crystal mode is a reasonable performance hedge.
